title: Zendaya Says She’s ‘Going Into Hiding’ After Huge 2026 With ‘The Drama,’ ‘Euphoria,’ ‘Spider-Man 4’ and More: ‘I Hope People Don’t Get Sick of Me’
summary: Prepare to be sick of Zendaya — though she hopes you won’t be. The Emmy and Golden Globe winner has a stacked 2026 with releases for A24’s “The Drama” (April 3), “Euphoria” Season 3 (April 12), Christopher Nolan’s “The Odyssey” (July 17), “Spider-Man: Brand New Day” (July 31) and “Dune: Part Three”…
